## 自查清单 / Checklist

- [ ] 后端 `pytest` 全绿 / backend tests pass
- [ ] 前端 `npm run test` + `npm run build` 通过 / frontend tests + build pass
- [ ] 已自查 diff，无密钥 / 真实基础设施标识 / no secrets or real infra identifiers in the diff
- [ ] 如有必要已更新文档 / docs updated if needed
